name: Mincemeat Plum Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-cup glass measure or bowl, combine the mincemeat, brown sugar, butter, orange juice, rind, and rum. Microwave at high for 3 minutes or until the butter is melted and the mixture is hot, stirring once.
2. In another bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon.
3. Pour the mincemeat mixture over the dry ingredients, along with beaten eggs and nuts; stir until the batter is well combined.
4. Lightly grease a 2-quart ring mold or souffle dish and line the bottom with parchment paper, greasing the paper.
5. If using a souffle dish, invert a greased glass into the center of the dish. Spoon batter evenly into the prepared dish.
6. Place an inverted dinner plate in the bottom of the microwave and set the dish on the plate. Microwave at medium for 10 minutes.
7. Rotate the dish and microwave at high for 2 - 4 minutes more or until the top is no longer moist. Let stand on counter top for 15 minutes.
8. Run a knife around the outside of the dish. Invert onto a serving plate and let cool completely. To serve, reheat pudding, uncovered at medium for 4 - 6 minutes or until warm. Accompany with Rum Eggnog Sauce.
9. Serves 8.
